text:
Once upon a time, there was a rabbit who loved listening to stories. Every evening after dinner, she'd nestle into her favourite chair and listen to her favourite old storyteller rabbit.

One moonlit night, Owl-Owl-Owl began her tales.

"A story goes," she started sadly, "that there was an owl who couldn't fly."

Just then a crow flew overhead.

"Ohawk!"

That night Owl-Owl-Owl was impossible. She couldn't fly because she loved mysteries!

"Maybe she loves mysteries," she thought.

She flew closer.

"Ohooo!"

She couldn’t hear anything. Surely she hadn’t fallen...

She perched carefully.

Oh! That sounded... like laughter!

She hopped closer.

Oh dear!

A small fox was playing the tiny violin!

"Noises?" she shrihed.

"Oh! Oh!")

Just as she thought she heard something else...

"Wump!"

A bat flying fast.

"Oh?"

Just then the owl saw something.

A raccoon!
